name: Fast MCP Telegram
description: Production-grade Telegram MCP server with direct MTProto API access, multi-user Bearer ACL, dual transport (stdio + HTTP SSE), voice transcription, file attachments, and context-optimized design. One-command setup with uvx fast-mcp-telegram.

API_ID.description: Telegram API ID from my.telegram.org. Required for both user and bot accounts.

API_HASH.description: Telegram API Hash from my.telegram.org. Required for both user and bot accounts.

PHONE_NUMBER.description: Phone number with country code (e.g. +1234567890). Required for user account setup.

BOT_API_TOKEN.description: Bot token from @BotFather. Alternative to phone number for bot account setup. Simpler authentication, limited to bot API features.

SERVER_MODE.description: Server transport mode: stdio (local MCP clients), http-auth (remote/production, requires Bearer token), http-no-auth (dev, no auth). Default: http-auth

DOMAIN.description: Public domain for web setup UI and attachment URL generation. Required for http-auth mode.

SESSION_NAME.description: Session file name for stdio mode. Default: telegram
